feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: is this supposed to be the best movie of all time?
entry.content: >be cripple loser war vet Jake Sully >government gives you 1 in a gazillion chance to take your more successful brother's place and be a space colonizer and also will give you a new 9 ft body so you'll never have to be a cripple again and get back to having sex with a new massive carbon fiber reinforced cock >your mission is to simply convince the natives to move somewhere peacefully >actually goes to fuck the equivalent of chief's daughter >betrays his own race over tall smurfs and blue waffle

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Ah yesss, I KNEW the red button was the way to go! Now I can live and just keep…
entry.content: >Ah yesss, I KNEW the red button was the way to go! Now I can live and just keep playing video ga-... hey, where's all the new games? Scratch that, where's any new productions in literally any artistic medium? Where's all the heartfelt stories filled with morals? Why is everything just live service and the games that do exist just keep getting worse and stingy with every passing day? Guys? GUYS? WHATS GOING ON??? HELP MEEEEE!!!!!

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Hardwiring a dashcam
entry.content: I'm trying to hardwire a dashcam for my dad and the heat is cooking my brain so I need some help. Which fuses would you tap for accessory and constant power? I'll post the diagram in a moment but everything seems like something important that I don't want to fuck with. This is the fuse box under the passenger carpet for a 2022 GLB250.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: There's still hope for humankind:
entry.content: >There’s a silent epidemic building in colleges and universities throughout the country — and as you might imagine, it has everything to do with AI. >As one New York financier told Financial Times journalist Gillian Tett, new hires who were seen as “AI natives” are turning out to have alarmingly shallow ideas. So much so, the anonymous finance worker admitted, that his firm now actively avoids seeking out AI-literate STEM graduates, and opts to comb through humanities students instead. https://f

entry.title: /g/ Technology: How can I find a phone that's buried in the sand on the beach and has no battery?
entry.content: Hello. This morning my father went to the beach, and right where his phone was, the tractor that cleans the sand went over. It seems to have buried the phone, and we don't know how deep it is. Luckily, we know its last known location, which narrows down the search area, but without a metal detector, we have no idea where it is. Can anyone help? The phone is an Xiaomi 15T pro

entry.content: Cast list for BB28 will likely drop today or tomorrow. We're rumored to have 4 reality tv vets on the show, one of whom is from Big Brother itself. Who does everyone hope to see? Who would be worst case scenarios? Current speculations include BB26 Angela and Dee from Survivor. BB28 House tour - https://bigbrothernetwork.com/big-b rother-28-house-tour-photos-video/ BB28 Premiere - Thursday, July 9, 8 p.m. EST BB28 Feeds - (Allegedly) Friday, July 10, 9 p.m. EST

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Should I keep my truck or trade it?
entry.content: I have been considering trading in my Diesel Colorado for a GR86/BRZ. Initially I bought the vehicle as I needed the 4x4 for the job I had at the time, however I no longer have that job, and thus no longer need the truck. However, I'm coming to find out that what I have is actually kind of rare. I cannot find another diesel Colorado within 500 miles with miles as low as mine, and I highly doubt they will ever sell another diesel quarter ton in the US ever again due to emissions restrictions. Plu

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /prod/ - big brain in a big cranium edition
entry.content: >Ne-Yo wrote the 2006 hit single "Irreplaceable" for Beyoncé. It was featured on her sophomore album, B'Day. Ne-Yo originally wrote the track for himself as a country-style song. He decided to give it to Beyoncé because he felt the lyrics about easily replacing a partner sounded empowering coming from a woman, but would have come across as mean and misogynistic if sung by a man.
